{{Quote|I am the only one allowed to kill my employees with impunity.|Mourno Draver|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Mourno Draver''' was a representative of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talus/Legends|Talus]]. He was a criminal, doing business with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] and ruthlessly killing those who posed a threat to his operations.

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the Hutts killed one of his employees during a negotiation. In retaliation, Draver hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to eliminate a Hutt employee. After the job was done, he paid the spacer to destroy a [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]] operation of the Hutts outside [[Dearic/Legends|Dearic]] to make them "understand the financial costs associated with poor management".
